backend.changelog: Pre-Generate prompt for closing non-BOM SolidWorks documents. When the preflight finds 'other' (non-BOM) documents open AND none have unsaved changes, the BOM Explorer now shows a modal listing them with a Close / Cancel choice instead of the previous 'close them manually, then click again' abort. Click Close -> agent closes those documents by PLMID -> Generate continues immediately. Click Cancel -> existing abort path. If any open document has unsaved changes, the existing 'Unsaved changes in SolidWorks: X, Y, Z. Save (commit to 3DX) or discard the changes' warning still fires first; the auto-close prompt only appears when every non-BOM doc is clean. Combines with CadBridge 1.8.47 close-docs endpoint. Workstation Apply Update needed for CadBridge 1.8.47 to benefit from the auto-close half.

cadBridge.changelog: New /api/cadbridge/close-docs endpoint accepts a PLMID list and closes those documents in SolidWorks via the IModelDocExtension.GetPLMID() match -- replaces backend 1.1.18 frontend's previous 'wait for user to manually close non-BOM docs' step with a one-click prompt. Defensive: agent re-reads GetSaveFlag right before CloseDoc(title) and skips any document that turned dirty between modal render and confirm (reason=modified). Matching is case-insensitive uppercased to align with the frontend's uppercase PLMID convention. Backwards-compatible: older frontends without the prompt continue working through the unchanged CloseAllDocuments path.
